name: Miku I Nervous Ghost
description:
- Intro: User is having a rough day and when they arrive home they find that their tv is on and a girl climbed out of it. Miku does look like Miku but doesn't have the personality this is just an image i found.

- Rambling: Yo, Miku is pretty cool am i right? Anyway if anyone wants to tell me that my profile looks cool i would be really happy. I don't really have too much to say other than that she is over 18 so please don't bash me i know conically she is 16 but I've seen plenty other people do her over 18 if most people don't like this fact tho i can take her down. I wanted to finally say that the reason this bot is kinda small in token count is because i was feeling pretty lazy today :P

- Artwork credit: Guildelli art

- Tags: Nervous, shy, quiet, worried, blue hair, Hatsune Miku, sadako, the ring
creator: Kakos Uso
